claim: Gemini 2.5 Pro combines an enhanced base model with improved post-training (including reinforcement learning techniques like verified reward models) to achieve better reasoning
actionable: When choosing between models, evaluate the base model quality first as it impacts downstream post-training effectiveness
source_title: Gemini 2.5 - The Thinking Family of Models

claim: Reasoning models like Gemini 2.5 Pro use structured chain-of-thought where they break thinking into numbered steps and sub-points, unlike continuous reasoning in other models
actionable: When working with reasoning models, examine their structured thinking tokens to understand how they decompose problems into steps
source_title: Gemini 2.5 - The Thinking Family of Models

claim: Thinking tokens in reasoning models are valuable not just for getting final answers but for justifying and explaining the reasoning behind those answers
actionable: Request and expose thinking tokens when you need to validate model reasoning or explain decisions to end users
source_title: Gemini 2.5 - The Thinking Family of Models

claim: Reasoning models like Gemini 2.5 enhance reasoning without needing test-time techniques like majority voting - they achieve high quality from single attempts
actionable: Use reasoning models for single-shot inference on complex problems rather than sampling multiple responses and aggregating
source_title: Gemini 2.5 - The Thinking Family of Models

claim: Thinking tokens are currently not available via the API for Gemini 2.5 Pro - only in the consumer app and AI Studio, which is a limitation
actionable: If you need to access thinking tokens, use the consumer Gemini app or AI Studio rather than the API until Google makes them available
source_title: Gemini 2.5 - The Thinking Family of Models

claim: Multimodal reasoning models can combine vision (analyzing images) with search to synthesize information and answer complex queries
actionable: When you need to analyze images and incorporate external information, use multimodal reasoning models with search capabilities
source_title: Gemini 2.5 - The Thinking Family of Models
